heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 410zzz–5 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are hereby authorized to be appropriated such sums, but not more than $10,632,000 for development, as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of this subchapter. For the acquisition of lands or interest therein, there is authorized to be appropriated not to exceed $2,000,000.
notes: Amendments2000— substituted “$10,632,000” for “$2,677,000” and “$2,000,000” for “$80,000”.Pub. L. 106–4911976—, substituted “$2,677,000” for “$210,000”.Pub. L. 94–578, § 201(7), inserted at end “For the acquisition of lands or interest therein, there is authorized to be appropriated not to exceed $80,000.”Pub. L. 94–578, § 101(10)
amendments: Amendments2000— substituted “$10,632,000” for “$2,677,000” and “$2,000,000” for “$80,000”.Pub. L. 106–4911976—, substituted “$2,677,000” for “$210,000”.Pub. L. 94–578, § 201(7), inserted at end “For the acquisition of lands or interest therein, there is authorized to be appropriated not to exceed $80,000.”Pub. L. 94–578, § 101(10)
